{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232002357446723AAEF5F2DFDF39"}"},"total":970},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7516732275107955518","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"比其他拖拖拉拉，的求生游戏好多了，有很明显的主线。而且这里的系统不是那种想让求生死的那种坏系统。而且男主是善人，不是那种冷漠的主角。爱了爱了","text_exts":[{"e":13,"s":9,"text":"求生游戏","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%B1%82%E7%94%9F%E6%B8%B8%E6%88%8F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774267355F2DFDF39%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227516732275107955518%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227481984013448531006%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B1%82%E7%94%9F%E6%B8%B8%E6%88%8F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1750131836,"group_id":"7481984013448531006","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"希望一直带来好作品，期待下次相遇。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8bvayX3xBbjFSH+F8Po4Ra7TeOgE+dm2NZK4t1IipdP","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/34f182346a0a4430acca1331b29bfa44~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794286&x-signature=QxEAlWuWYoQx6IIEeVrbP6LGw7E%3D","user_id":"1456181182207840","user_name":"蘇阿苏"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1456181182207840","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7481984013448531006","book_info":{"abstract":"【灯塔求生，全民穿越，游戏，末日，求生，天赋，轻微克系】
全民穿越到陌生的海洋世界，开局只有一座孤岛，一座灯塔！
在这里，所有人都从零开始。
这里，有遮天蔽日的巨兽，诡异的迷雾，恐怖的海兽，魅惑的海妖，神奇的生物，废弃的荒岛，以及强大的灯塔。
在这里，灯塔是所有人赖以生存的保障，但是不要忘记了海岛也是！
这里的天气多灾多变，各种天灾气候将会大大提升生存难度。
但是这里，也拥有各种各样的神奇物品，能帮助所有人生存下去。
有人开局获得一座移动岛屿，让他能在海面上闯荡海洋！
有人开局获得一座炮塔灯塔，强大的火力让登岛的海兽死无葬身之地！
有人开局啥也没有！
所有人开局都能获得天赋。
一切的一切，所有的所有，首先要做的是！
活下去！
